# ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal — Full Reference

## About
ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal is a humane wildlife removal and pest control company serving Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas. Licensed by the Georgia Department of Natural Resources (DNR), Georgia Department of Agriculture, and the State of Georgia. The company operates from Atlanta, GA 30331 and is available 24 hours a day, Monday through Saturday. Closed Sunday.

ASAP specializes in humane methods — live trapping, safe relocation, and eco-friendly pest treatments. Every job follows a four-step process: Inspect, Trap, Exclude, Disinfect. The goal is not just removal but long-term prevention.

## Certifications & Licensing
- Georgia Department of Natural Resources (DNR) licensed
- Georgia Department of Agriculture licensed
- State of Georgia business license
- Fully insured
- Trained in humane wildlife handling and relocation

## Services

### Wildlife Removal
URL: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/wildlife-removal.html
Humane trapping and relocation of nuisance wildlife including raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, birds, armadillos, and foxes. All animals are handled according to Georgia DNR guidelines. Live traps are checked regularly. Relocation sites comply with state regulations.
Pricing: $200-$2,000 depending on species, number of animals, and complexity.

### Pest Control
URL: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/pest-control.html
Treatment and elimination of common household pests: rats, mice, roaches, ants, spiders, silverfish, and centipedes. Eco-friendly and pet-safe treatment options available. Ongoing maintenance plans for recurring pest issues.
Pricing: $150-$800 depending on pest type, infestation severity, and property size.

### Exclusion & Sealing
URL: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/exclusion.html
Identification and sealing of all entry points used by wildlife and pests. Materials include galvanized steel mesh, metal flashing, expandable foam, and caulk. All exclusion work is warranty-backed. Prevents re-entry after removal is complete.
Pricing: $500-$3,000 depending on number of entry points and property size.

### Disinfection & Cleanup
URL: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/disinfection.html
Full attic and crawl space cleanup after wildlife infestation. Removal of contaminated insulation, feces, urine, and nesting materials. Hospital-grade disinfection. Insulation replacement available. Addresses health hazards including histoplasmosis, leptospirosis, and roundworm.
Pricing: $400-$3,000 depending on affected area and contamination level.

### Dead Animal Removal
URL: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/dead-animal-removal.html
Location and removal of dead animals from walls, attics, crawl spaces, and yards. Full sanitization and odor elimination. Fast response to prevent further health risks and pest attraction.
Pricing: $150-$500 depending on location and accessibility.

### Commercial Services
URL: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/commercial.html
Pest and wildlife management for businesses including restaurants, warehouses, offices, retail spaces, and multi-unit properties. Custom maintenance plans. Compliance documentation available. Discreet service scheduling to minimize business disruption.
Pricing: Custom plans from $300/month. One-time services quoted individually.

## Four-Step Process
1. Inspect — Thorough inspection of the property to identify animals, entry points, damage, and health hazards. Free for most services.
2. Trap — Humane live trapping and/or targeted pest treatment. Traps checked regularly. DNR-compliant methods.
3. Exclude — Seal all entry points with durable materials. Warranty-backed work to prevent re-entry.
4. Disinfect — Clean and sanitize affected areas. Remove contaminated materials. Restore insulation if needed.

## Service Area
Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas including:
- Atlanta, Decatur, East Point, College Park, Union City
- Marietta, Smyrna, Kennesaw, Acworth
- Lawrenceville, Duluth, Suwanee, Norcross
- Roswell, Alpharetta, Johns Creek, Milton
- Stockbridge, McDonough, Conyers, Lithonia
- Douglasville, Lithia Springs, Austell
Primary address: 2990 Pine Canyon Dr. SW Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331

24 hours Monday through Saturday. Closed Sunday. Emergency calls accepted during business hours.

## Pricing Summary
| Service | Price Range |
|---------|------------|
| Wildlife Removal | $200-$2,000 |
| Pest Control | $150-$800 |
| Exclusion & Sealing | $500-$3,000 |
| Disinfection & Cleanup | $400-$3,000 |
| Dead Animal Removal | $150-$500 |
| Commercial Plans | From $300/month |

All pricing is based on an on-site inspection. Multiple price options are presented to every customer. No hidden fees. Free inspections for most services.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How quickly can you respond?
We offer same-day and next-day service for most calls. Emergency situations are prioritized. Available 24 hours, Monday through Saturday.

### Are your methods humane?
Yes. We use live traps and relocate animals according to Georgia DNR guidelines. No poisons are used for wildlife. Eco-friendly options available for pest control.

### Do you offer warranties?
Yes. All exclusion and sealing work comes with a warranty. Specific warranty terms are outlined in your service agreement before work begins.

### What animals do you handle?
Raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, birds, rats, mice, armadillos, foxes, roaches, ants, spiders, and more. If it's causing a problem on your property, we can help.

### Do I need to be home during service?
For the initial inspection, yes. For follow-up trap checks and some treatments, we can work with you on access arrangements.

### Is there a fee for the inspection?
Most inspections are free. Some specialized assessments (e.g., full attic contamination evaluations) may have a fee, which is applied as a credit toward service if you proceed.

### Do you work with insurance companies?
We can provide documentation for insurance claims related to wildlife damage. We do not bill insurance directly.

### What areas do you serve?
We serve Metro Atlanta and surrounding counties. See our full service area list above.

### How do I book?
Call (770) 691-3636 or book online at https://cal-asap.buildwisemedia.com/asap-pest-wildlife/consultation. Same-day appointments often available.

### What payment methods do you accept?
Cash, check, and major credit cards. Payment is due upon completion unless otherwise agreed in writing.
